buildCommand: echo '=== Checking fhir-rest-client installation ===' && ls -la node_modules/fhir-rest-client/ && echo '=== package.json ===' && cat node_modules/fhir-rest-client/package.json && echo '=== dist directory ===' && ls -la node_modules/fhir-rest-client/dist/ && echo '=== Building ===' && npm run build
